# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrade Brick Breaker to .NET 10 using an all-at-once strategy because the assessment shows low complexity and no API compatibility blockers. Work will execute as one atomic upgrade task with build/test validation across the full solution scope.

**Progress**: 1/1 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-solution-upgrade: Upgrade project framework and dependencies
